debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_starts_in_1 :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.startsIn1Condition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
⊢ u ≠ v

failed_attempts: (by intro h; simp [← h, dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive)
(by intro h; subst h; have := h_exhaustive _ (by simp [dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); contradiction)
(by intro h; have := h_exhaustive _ (h ▸ by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this; contradiction)
(fun h => by subst h; have := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) (by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this)

(by intro h_uv; have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]; apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; rfl; have h_ir := h_exhaustive _ (h_uv ▸ h_in); simp at h_ir)
(by intro h; simp [exhaustiveCondition, h.symm, dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive)
(by intro h; have := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) (by rw [← h, dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this)
(by intro h; rw [exhaustiveCondition, ← h, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive)
(by intro h; have h_ir := h_exhaustive _ (h ▸ dstep.sound.symm ▸ by simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at h_ir)
(by intro h; subst h; have := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) (by rw [dstep.sound]; simp); simp at this)
(by intro h; rw [h, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; cases h_exhaustive _ (by simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]))
(by intro h; subst h; have := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) (by simp [dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this)
(by intro h; rw [← h, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive; contradiction)

(by intro h_eq; have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by simp [dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]; apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; rfl; rw [h_eq] at h_in; have h_ir := h_exhaustive _ h_in; simp at h_ir)
(by intro h; have h_v := h_exhaustive _ (by rw [← h, dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at h_v)
(by intro h; simp [←h, dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive)

(by intro h_uv; have h_var : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]; have := h_exhaustive _ (h_uv ▸ h_var); simp [ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition] at this)
(fun h => by rw [← h, exhaustiveCondition, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp at h_exhaustive; exact h_exhaustive)
(by intro h_uv; rw [← h_uv, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp at h_exhaustive)
(by intro h; rw [h, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp [exhaustiveCondition, Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive; contradiction)
(by intro h; rw [← h] at h_exhaustive; have := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) (by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this)
(fun h_uv => by have := h_exhaustive _ (h_uv ▸ dstep.sound ▸ by simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this)
(by intro h_uv; have h_v := h_exhaustive _ (by rw [← h_uv, dstep.sound]; simp); simp at h_v)
(by intro h_uv; rw [← h_uv, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive; contradiction)
(by intro h; have := h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs) (by rw [← h, dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]); simp at this)
(by intro h; simpa [← h, dstep.sound, Word.mem_mul_iff_or] using h_exhaustive (Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs))
(by intro h; rw [h] at h_exhaustive; have h' := h_exhaustive _ (by rw [dstep.sound]; simp); simp at h')
(by intro h; rw [h, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or] at h_exhaustive)

(by intro h; have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by { have h_s := dstep.sound; simp at h_s; simp [h_s, Word.mem_mul_iff_or]; apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; tauto }; have h_ex := h_exhaustive _ (h ▸ h_in); simp at h_ex)
(by intro h; simp [← h, dstep.sound] at h_exhaustive; contradiction)

(by intro h; have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]; apply Or.inl; apply Or.inr; rfl; have h_ir := h_exhaustive _ (h ▸ h_in); simp at h_ir; contradiction)

(by intro h; rw [exhaustiveCondition] at h_exhaustive; have h_in : Sum.inl dstep.prod.val.lhs ∈ u := by rw [dstep.sound]; simp [Word.mem_mul_iff_or]; tauto; rw [h] at h_in; have := h_exhaustive _ h_in; simp at this)
